LanguageData.Ammo_44SWSpecial_FMJ.label: .44 Special (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_44SWSpecial_FMJ.description: A centerfire pistol and revolver cartridge that was one of the first to be purposely designed for smokeless powder.
LanguageData.Ammo_44SWSpecial_AP.label: .44 Special (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_44SWSpecial_AP.description: A centerfire pistol and revolver cartridge that was one of the first to be purposely designed for smokeless powder.
LanguageData.Ammo_44SWSpecial_HP.label: .44 Special (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_44SWSpecial_HP.description: A centerfire pistol and revolver cartridge that was one of the first to be purposely designed for smokeless powder.
LanguageData.Bullet_44SWSpecial_FMJ.label: .44 Special bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_44SWSpecial_AP.label: .44 Special bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_44SWSpecial_HP.label: .44 Special bullet (HP)
LanguageData.Bullet_44SWSpecial_HV_FMJ.label: .44 Special bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_44SWSpecial_HV_AP.label: .44 Special bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_44SWSpecial_HV_HP.label: .44 Special bullet (HP)
